tips: You can use Sucker Punch to sneak up on your enemies!
Don't forget to leave a review and a like if you enjoy the game!
Rituals require a sacrifice to play and have no energy cost!
Status effects trigger before Start of Turn effects
You can change your camera settings in Settings/Preferences
Placing cards is playing cards from your hand, Awakening is a card spawning on the field. Placed cards are awakened too
